title: Genie entity matching and point map support
body:
* **Increased entity matching support in Genie**: Each entity matching (previously value dictionary) column in Genie now supports 1024 values per column, up from 255. Click **Refresh** on your existing entity matching columns to increase cardinality support. See [Tune Genie Agent quality](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality).
* **Point maps support in Genie**: Point maps are now supported in Genie.
